headline: Does Ameren’s 2025 Earnings Beat And Reaffirmed 2026 Guidance Change The Bull Case For AEE?
summary: Ameren Corporation previously reported fourth-quarter 2025 earnings that exceeded expectations, with higher operating income and stronger results from the Ameren Missouri segment supported by infrastructure investments and new electric service rates effective June 1, 2025. The company also reaffirmed its 2026 earnings guidance, signaling management’s confidence in its near-term outlook despite ongoing regulatory and infrastructure demands. Now we’ll explore how Ameren’s earnings beat and...
